compiled_state.title: RED: Write failing tests for debug-everything and end-session CLI lifecycle
compiled_state.author: Test
compiled_state.description:
## Description
Create tests/skills/test-cli-lifecycle-migration.sh asserting: debug-everything dispatch references use CLI, end-session cleanup handles .playwright-cli/ directory, cleanup-claude-session.sh handles CLI state.

Test functions:
- test_debug_everything_no_mcp_dispatch: asserts debug-everything/SKILL.md Playwright dispatch uses CLI patterns
- test_end_session_cli_cleanup: asserts end-session/SKILL.md references .playwright-cli/ not .playwright-mcp/
- test_cleanup_script_cli_directory: asserts cleanup-claude-session.sh handles .playwright-cli/ directory
- test_cleanup_script_orphan_processes: asserts cleanup script handles CLI browser processes

All tests fail because files still reference MCP patterns.

## File Impact
- tests/skills/test-cli-lifecycle-migration.sh (CREATE)
- .test-index (EDIT)

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] Test file exists and is executable
  Verify: test -x tests/skills/test-cli-lifecycle-migration.sh
- [ ] Contains at least 4 test functions
  Verify: grep -c "^test_" tests/skills/test-cli-lifecycle-migration.sh | awk '{exit ($1 < 4)}'
- [ ] All tests fail (RED)
  Verify: bash tests/skills/test-cli-lifecycle-migration.sh 2>&1 | grep -q "FAIL"
- [ ] bash tests/run-all.sh passes (exit 0)
  Verify: bash tests/run-all.sh

comments.body: Fixed: RED test suite created, all tests fail against current MCP patterns
comments.author: Test
